spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.general_idea: Integrate SLF4J logging to track the lifecycle of the web application initializer startup method.
spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.human_impl: import org.slf4j.Logger; import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory; private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(AppInitializer.class); LOGGER.debug("+onStartup({})", servletContext);

spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add class-level and method-level Javadoc comments to improve code documentation.
Replace hard-coded package string with dynamic class-based package resolution for component scanning.
Rename the ServletContext parameter from 'sc' to 'servletContext' for better readability and consistency.
Adjust indentation and line breaks for the filter registration chain to match modern coding standards.
Added Javadoc block to the main application class to document author, version, and creation date.
spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.human_impl: Added /** @author ... @version ... @since ... */ block above the class declaration.

spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.general_idea: Added Javadoc comment to the main method to document the args parameter.
spring-security-web-login/src/main/java/.human_impl: Added /** @param args */ block above the main method.

spring-security-web-login/src/test/java/.general_idea: Updated the Spring context configuration path to match the new kebab-case naming convention of the XML file.

Replaced the deprecated mysql-connector-java artifact with the new mysql-connector-j artifact and specified version 8.2.0.
Changed the project version from a hardcoded snapshot value to a variable placeholder for external version management.

Added the standard XML declaration header to the pom.xml file.
